mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FRIEND_MESSAGE ( MESSAGE_ID, USER_ID, FRIEND_USER_ID, MESSAGE, READ_YN, INSERT_USER_ID ) VALUES ( #{messageId}, #{userId}, #{friendId}, #{message}, #{readYN}, #{insertUserId} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE MESSAGE = #{message}, READ_YN = #{readYN}, UPDATE_USER_ID = #{updateUserId}

INSERT INTO FRIEND_INFO ( USER_ID, FRIEND_USER_ID, USER_NICKNAME, FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME, AVAIL_STATUS, REMARKS ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{friendUserId}, #{userNickname}, #{friendUserNickname}, #{availStatus}, #{friendRequestMessage} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE USER_NICKNAME = #{userNickname}, FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME = #{friendUserNickname}, AVAIL_STATUS = #{availStatus}, REMARKS = #{friendRequestMessage}
mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID, FRIEND_USER_ID, USER_NICKNAME, FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME, AVAIL_STATUS, REMARKS AS FRIEND_REQUEST_MESSAGE FROM FRIEND_INFO WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND AVAIL_STATUS = '02'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FRIEND_INFO WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND AVAIL_STATUS = '02'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM FRIEND_INFO WHERE FRIEND_USER_ID = #{userId} AND AVAIL_STATUS = '01'

SELECT FI.FRIEND_USER_ID, H.HOMPI_ID, FI.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME, HC.HOMPI_CONFIG_CONTENT, AFM.FILE_PATH, CASE WHEN FI.FRIEND_USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM USER_LOGIN) THEN 'LOGIN' ELSE 'LOGOUT' END AS LOGIN_STATUS FROM FRIEND_INFO AS FI JOIN HOMPI AS H ON FI.FRIEND_USER_ID = H.OWNER_USER_ID JOIN HOMPI_CONFIG AS HC ON H.HOMPI_ID = HC.HOMPI_ID AND HC.HOMPI_CONFIG_CODE = '04' JOIN MINIMI_BASIC AS MB ON MB.USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN PRODUCT AS P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = MB.PRODUCT_ID JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE AS AFM ON AFM.ATTACH_FILE_ID = P.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE FI.USER_ID = #{userId} AND FI.AVAIL_STATUS = '02' ORDER BY CASE WHEN FI.FRIEND_USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM USER_LOGIN) THEN 0 ELSE 1, END ASC

SELECT FI.FRIEND_USER_ID AS FRIEND_ID, H.HOMPI_ID AS FRIEND_HOMPI_ID, FI.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME AS FRIEND_NAME, HC.HOMPI_CONFIG_CONTENT AS FRIEND_MOOD, AFM.FILE_PATH AS FRIEND_MINIMI, CASE WHEN FI.FRIEND_USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM USER_LOGIN) THEN 'LOGIN' ELSE 'LOGOUT' END AS FRIEND_LOGIN_STATUS FROM FRIEND_INFO AS FI JOIN HOMPI AS H ON FI.FRIEND_USER_ID = H.OWNER_USER_ID JOIN HOMPI_CONFIG AS HC ON H.HOMPI_ID = HC.HOMPI_ID AND HC.HOMPI_CONFIG_CODE = '04' JOIN MINIMI_BASIC AS MB ON MB.USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN PRODUCT AS P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = MB.PRODUCT_ID JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE AS AFM ON AFM.ATTACH_FILE_ID = P.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE FI.USER_ID = #{userId} AND FI.AVAIL_STATUS = '02' ORDER BY CASE WHEN FI.FRIEND_USER_ID IN (SELECT USER_ID FROM USER_LOGIN) THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, FI.FRIEND_USER_ID ASC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT UBU.NAME AS USER_NAME, FI.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, UBF.NAME AS FRIEND_NAME, FI.USER_NICKNAME AS FRIEND_NICKNAME, FI.USER_ID AS FRIEND_ID, H.HOMPI_ID AS FRIEND_HOMPI_ID, DATE_FORMAT(FI.INSERT_DT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS FRIEND_REQUEST_DT, AFM.FILE_PATH AS FRIEND_MINIMI, FI.REMARKS AS FRIEND_REQUEST_MESSAGE FROM FRIEND_INFO AS FI JOIN USER_BASIC AS UBU ON UBU.USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN USER_BASIC AS UBF ON UBF.USER_ID = FI.USER_ID JOIN HOMPI AS H ON H.OWNER_USER_ID = FI.USER_ID JOIN MINIMI_BASIC AS MB ON MB.USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN PRODUCT AS P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = MB.PRODUCT_ID JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE AS AFM ON AFM.ATTACH_FILE_ID = P.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE FI.FRIEND_USER_ID = #{userId} AND FI.AVAIL_STATUS = '01' ORDER BY FI.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT UBU.NAME AS USER_NAME, FI.USER_NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, UBF.NAME AS FRIEND_NAME, FI.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME AS FRIEND_NICKNAME, FI.FRIEND_USER_ID AS FRIEND_ID, H.HOMPI_ID AS FRIEND_HOMPI_ID, DATE_FORMAT(FI.INSERT_DT, '%Y.%m.%d %H:%i') AS FRIEND_REQUEST_DT, AFM.FILE_PATH AS FRIEND_MINIMI, FI.REMARKS AS FRIEND_REQUEST_MESSAGE FROM FRIEND_INFO AS FI JOIN USER_BASIC AS UBU ON UBU.USER_ID = FI.USER_ID JOIN USER_BASIC AS UBF ON UBF.USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN HOMPI AS H ON H.OWNER_USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN MINIMI_BASIC AS MB ON MB.USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN PRODUCT AS P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = MB.PRODUCT_ID JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE AS AFM ON AFM.ATTACH_FILE_ID = P.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE FI.USER_ID = #{userId} AND FI.AVAIL_STATUS = '01' ORDER BY FI.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}

SELECT FI.FRIEND_USER_ID AS FRIEND_ID, FI.FRIEND_USER_NICKNAME AS FRIEND_NICKNAME, FI.USER_NICKNAME AS USER_NICKNAME, AFM.FILE_PATH AS FRIEND_MINIMI, DATE_FORMAT(FI.INSERT_DT, '%Y.%m.%d') AS START_DATE FROM FRIEND_INFO AS FI JOIN MINIMI_BASIC AS MB ON MB.USER_ID = FI.FRIEND_USER_ID JOIN PRODUCT AS P ON P.PRODUCT_ID = MB.PRODUCT_ID JOIN ATTACH_FILE_MANAGE AS AFM ON AFM.ATTACH_FILE_ID = P.ATTACH_FILE_ID WHERE FI.USER_ID = #{userId} AND FI.AVAIL_STATUS = '01' ORDER BY FI.INSERT_DT DESC LIMIT #{start}, #{size}
